type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The NOx emissions calculations have been reviewed for 2020. We confirm that the reported quantities calculated based on the 2020 Petrinex data as well as equipment specs and operating hours provided by Tourmaline are correct.
Emissions factors were taken from either engine manufacturer’s specification sheets, engine tests, or published documents by Clearstone Engineering Ltd.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The CO emissions calculations have been reviewed for 2020. We confirm that the reported quantities calculated based on the 2020 Petrinex data as well as equipment specs and operating hours provided by Tourmaline are correct.
Emissions factors were taken from either engine manufacturer’s specification sheets, engine tests, or published documents by Clearstone Engineering Ltd.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Insufficient understanding of how to implement pollution prevention activities
